message:
test(bd-2um1): add unit tests for docket.rs edge cases

Cover settings builders (poll_interval, max_retries), SubmitOptions clone,
DocketTask→TaskInfo/TaskResult for running/cancelled states, cancel running
task, requeue stale (with retry and at-limit), nack retry vs fail, dequeue
multi-type, Docket::memory constructor, and Worker subscribed_types.

Server tests: 1230 → 1244

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
